gotchas.symptom: MP API lookup returns empty / 'user not found' / joins fail for the signed-in user
gotchas.root_cause: Consumer passed `session.user.id` (Better Auth nanoid) to an MP query expecting a UUID matching `dp_Users.User_GUID`.
gotchas.fix: Always use `session.user.userGuid` for MP API lookups. `user.id` is only a 'session exists' sentinel. Cast required: `(session.user as { userGuid?: string }).userGuid`.

gotchas.symptom: User lands on tool index instead of specific tool + params after sign-in
gotchas.root_cause: callbackUrl dropped somewhere in the round-trip. Proxy must write x-pathname AND set callbackUrl on /signin redirects; AuthWrapper must read x-pathname.
gotchas.fix: Preserve x-pathname forwarding in src/proxy.ts and header read in src/components/layout/auth-wrapper.tsx.

gotchas.symptom: TypeScript error 'Property userGuid does not exist'
gotchas.root_cause: customSessionClient doesn't propagate additionalFields into its inferred session type (Better Auth 1.5 limitation). Runtime is correct.
gotchas.fix: Cast: `(session.user as { userGuid?: string }).userGuid`.

gotchas.symptom: Proxy lets request through but user reaches a broken state (no profile, errors on every action)
gotchas.root_cause: src/proxy.ts uses getSessionCookie() which only checks cookie presence — does not decode or validate the JWT. Forged/expired cookies pass the proxy; only AuthWrapper catches them.
gotchas.fix: Every protected page must sit under (web)/layout.tsx (AuthWrapper). Protected API/server actions must call auth.api.getSession themselves.

gotchas.symptom: Sign-out redirects to http://localhost:3000 in production
gotchas.root_cause: src/components/user-menu/actions.ts:20 falls back to localhost if BETTER_AUTH_URL and NEXTAUTH_URL both unset.
gotchas.fix: Throw (mirroring MINISTRY_PLATFORM_BASE_URL check on line 14-16) instead of silent fallback.

gotchas.symptom: First API call after cold boot fails with empty Authorization Bearer
gotchas.root_cause: Service method forgot to await this.client.ensureValidToken() before getHttpClient().get/post. HttpClient has no auto-refresh.
gotchas.fix: Every service method must start with await this.client.ensureValidToken() (or ensureValidDevToken()).

gotchas.symptom: N concurrent MP calls on cold server trigger N OAuth token POSTs
gotchas.root_cause: ensureValidToken has no in-flight promise deduplication.
gotchas.fix: Cache an in-flight refreshPromise. See TODO.

gotchas.symptom: Callers can't `e instanceof ZodError` after validation failure
gotchas.root_cause: MPHelper re-wraps Zod errors into plain Error. Structured .issues is lost.
gotchas.fix: Subclass MPValidationError carrying original ZodError. See TODO.

gotchas.symptom: Local edits to files under src/lib/providers/ministry-platform/models/ disappear
gotchas.root_cause: npm run mp:generate:models uses --clean which deletes every .ts file before regeneration.
gotchas.fix: Never hand-edit models/. Add runtime types in src/lib/dto/ or wrap with a DTO.

gotchas.symptom: Ambiguous column error from MP when $filter joins tables
gotchas.root_cause: MP API does not auto-qualify columns present in both base and joined tables.
gotchas.fix: Prefix columns: `Contacts.Contact_ID`. For FK traversal: `Contact_ID_TABLE.First_Name`. Multi-level: `Building_ID_TABLE_Location_ID_TABLE.Congregation_ID`.

gotchas.symptom: Passing @DomainID in executeProcedureWithBody causes parameter-count mismatch
gotchas.root_cause: MP REST API injects @DomainID automatically from token context; passing it double-binds.
gotchas.fix: Never include @DomainID in the body. Still declare @DomainID INT as first SQL parameter (required for MP API exposure).

gotchas.symptom: Deploy-tool call hits production MP instance by accident
gotchas.root_cause: Procedure names prefixed with api_dev_ are routed to dev credentials. Without prefix, api_dev_DeployTool would run with prod creds.
gotchas.fix: Keep api_dev_ prefix; ensure MINISTRY_PLATFORM_DEV_* env vars are set; dev-panel must stay localhost-only.

gotchas.symptom: File uploaded but no $userId audit trail
gotchas.root_cause: FileService.uploadFiles sends userId only as $userId query param, not FormData.
gotchas.fix: Always pass params.userId; verify MP receives it by checking dp_Audit_Log rows after upload.

gotchas.symptom: createCommunication with empty [] sends JSON not multipart
gotchas.root_cause: Branch condition is `attachments && attachments.length > 0`. Empty array is falsy for the multipart path.
gotchas.fix: Pass undefined or omit the second argument when no attachments.

gotchas.symptom: getTables('Contacts') returns multiple tables
gotchas.root_cause: MP $search is substring-match — returns Contact_Addresses, Contact_Log, etc.
gotchas.fix: Post-filter with `tables.find((t) => t.Table_Name === exact)`.

gotchas.symptom: Unescaped single quotes in $filter break query or enable injection
gotchas.root_cause: MP $filter accepts raw OData-style strings; user input pasted without escaping breaks parsing.
gotchas.fix: Always `term.replace(/'/g, "''")` before embedding user input. Or use escapeFilterString from src/lib/validation.ts.

gotchas.symptom: MP audit columns show wrong user (or test Better Auth user)
gotchas.root_cause: Passing session.user.id (Better Auth internal) as $userId.
gotchas.fix: Resolve numeric MP User_ID: UserService.getUserIdByGuid(session.user.userGuid), then pass as $userId.

gotchas.symptom: MP filter breaks on non-numeric record ID (NaN interpolation)
gotchas.root_cause: parseInt result cast through unknown/any reaches filter without validatePositiveInt check.
gotchas.fix: Call validatePositiveInt(id) before building any `ID = ${id}` filter.

gotchas.symptom: Field-management partial save leaves dp_Page_Fields inconsistent
gotchas.root_cause: updatePageFieldOrder calls SP once per field in batches of 5 with no transaction wrapper.
gotchas.fix: Caller wraps in try/catch; consider batch SP or transaction.

gotchas.symptom: useUser() throws 'useUser must be used within a UserProvider'
gotchas.root_cause: Consumer rendered outside the <UserProvider> tree.
gotchas.fix: Ensure component is descendant of <UserProvider> (mounted in src/app/providers.tsx). Convert to client component if needed.

gotchas.symptom: userProfile stays null and isLoading never resolves when session has no userGuid
gotchas.root_cause: Effect conditions don't cover the missing-userGuid case.
gotchas.fix: Gate UI on isLoading only when a userGuid is expected; handle missing case explicitly.

gotchas.symptom: Next.js errors 'sync dynamic API usage' or undefined params
gotchas.root_cause: Next.js 16 requires params, searchParams, cookies(), headers() to be awaited.
gotchas.fix: Always await these APIs.

gotchas.symptom: New public route redirects to /signin in a loop
gotchas.root_cause: Proxy public-path whitelist was not updated.
gotchas.fix: Add the path to the early-return branch in src/proxy.ts:18.

gotchas.symptom: CI runs `next lint` and fails — command unknown
gotchas.root_cause: Next.js 16 removed `next lint`. package.json uses `eslint .` with flat config.
gotchas.fix: Use `npm run lint`; config in eslint.config.mjs.

gotchas.symptom: ReferenceError: Cannot access 'mockX' before initialization
gotchas.root_cause: vi.mock() factories are hoisted above `const mockX = vi.fn()` declarations.
gotchas.fix: Wrap mock vars in vi.hoisted().

gotchas.symptom: TypeError: this.mp.methodName is not a function in service tests
gotchas.root_cause: MPHelper mocked with vi.fn().mockImplementation(...) or class missing a method the service calls.
gotchas.fix: Mock as class with every used method: `MPHelper: class { methodName = mockMethodName }`.

gotchas.symptom: Test passes in isolation but fails with full suite
gotchas.root_cause: Service singleton cached across tests — ServiceClass.instance still holds previous test's mock state.
gotchas.fix: Add `(ServiceClass as any).instance = undefined` inside beforeEach.

gotchas.symptom: Server action test crashes with 'headers(...).get is not a function'
gotchas.root_cause: next/headers mocked with plain object instead of Headers instance; Better Auth calls .get() on it.
gotchas.fix: `vi.mock('next/headers', () => ({ headers: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(new Headers()) }))`.

gotchas.symptom: Labels expected to have IMb show POSTNET (or nothing) with no log
gotchas.root_cause: preEncodeBarcodes wraps imbEncode in bare try/catch and silently falls through.
gotchas.fix: Log caught error and surface per-label barcodeError field.

gotchas.symptom: Tool page crashes when it assumes params.pageData is present
gotchas.root_cause: parseToolParams catches errors from ToolService.getPageData and leaves pageData undefined.
gotchas.fix: Always treat pageData as optional; guard with if (params.pageData).

gotchas.symptom: pageID/recordID values of NaN appear in downstream state
gotchas.root_cause: `x ? parseInt(x, 10) : undefined` assigns NaN for non-numeric strings.
gotchas.fix: Filter Number.isFinite after parseInt.

gotchas.symptom: AuthWrapper silently stops authenticating after adding 'use client'
gotchas.root_cause: AuthWrapper must be server component — uses next/headers and auth.api.getSession().
gotchas.fix: Keep auth-wrapper.tsx server component; put interactive state in child.

gotchas.symptom: Dev overlay unexpectedly appears in production
gotchas.root_cause: Gating lives inside DevPanel (NODE_ENV + hostname check) — not in ToolContainer.
gotchas.fix: Trust DevPanel self-gate; to hide overlay locally, drop params prop from ToolContainer.

gotchas.symptom: Dev-panel server actions callable in production despite UI hidden
gotchas.root_cause: 'use server' exports are network-addressable regardless of where imported. Only deploy-tool-actions checks NODE_ENV=production.
gotchas.fix: Extract shared requireDevSession helper, or document explicitly.

gotchas.symptom: User appears to sign out but is silently re-authenticated (logout loop)
gotchas.root_cause: post_logout_redirect_uri sent by handleSignOut is not registered on the MP OAuth client.
gotchas.fix: Register exact value of BETTER_AUTH_URL as post-logout redirect URI on MP OAuth client.

gotchas.symptom: Edit-mode Review screen shows 'ID: <n>' for Primary Contact / Parent Group
gotchas.root_cause: fetchGroupRecord returns numeric IDs only; display maps are never seeded from loaded record.
gotchas.fix: Extend GroupService.getGroup to return display names and seed maps before form.reset.

gotchas.symptom: Renaming Secure_Check-in breaks compilation in non-obvious places
gotchas.root_cause: Field name contains hyphen; referenced as quoted string in schema, STEP_FIELDS, SwitchRow, and step-review.
gotchas.fix: Search for Secure_Check-in across src/components/group-wizard and rename in all 5 sites.

gotchas.symptom: SSR/build error 'window is not defined' when loading /tools/templateeditor
gotchas.root_cause: GrapesJS touches DOM at import time.
gotchas.fix: Import EditorCanvas via next/dynamic with ssr:false; keep 'use client' on every file that imports grapesjs.

gotchas.symptom: Merge tokens like {{First_Name}} appear verbatim in sent emails
gotchas.root_cause: template-editor has no token resolver; tokens emitted literally by MJML compilation.
gotchas.fix: Resolve tokens in downstream send/render pipeline.

gotchas.symptom: IMb barcode silently becomes POSTNET or disappears
gotchas.root_cause: preEncodeBarcodes falls back from IMb to POSTNET when config.mailerId is empty.
gotchas.fix: Enter valid 6- or 9-digit USPS Mailer ID.

gotchas.symptom: Avery label cells misaligned after adding new stock
gotchas.root_cause: LABEL_STOCKS dimensions are in PDF points (72pt=1in).
gotchas.fix: Always enter new LABEL_STOCKS dimensions in points.

gotchas.symptom: Negative Page_Field_ID values make their way into MP if sent directly
gotchas.root_cause: fetchPageFieldData synthesizes client-only IDs starting at -1.
gotchas.fix: Never send Page_Field_ID to MP; FieldOrderPayload intentionally omits it.

gotchas.symptom: SkipRecord / FetchAddressLabelsResult indexing returns undefined
gotchas.root_cause: services.md lists wrong field names; actual DTO uses camelCase.
gotchas.fix: Use fields from src/lib/dto/address-label.dto.ts.

gotchas.symptom: Dev-panel UserToolsPanel always shows NOT AUTHORIZED
gotchas.root_cause: NEXT_PUBLIC_PROD_URL unset — path.includes(prodToolUrl) cannot match empty base URL.
gotchas.fix: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_PROD_URL to deployed tool URL.
